title: 如何部署Logtail容器采集Docker容器的标准输出-阿里云帮助中心
heading_path: 启动Logtail容器，替换${region_id}，${aliyun_account_id}，${user_defined_id} docker run -d \ -v /:/logtail_host:ro \ -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \ --env ALIYUN_LOGTAIL_CONFIG=/etc/ilogtail/conf/${region_id}/ilogtail_config.json \ --env ALIYUN_LOGTAIL_USER_ID=${aliyun_account_id} \ --env ALIYUN_LOGTAIL_USER_DEFINED_ID=${user_defined_id} \ registry.${region_id}.aliyuncs.com/log-service/logtail:v2.1.11.0-aliyun > 相关文档 > 权益
